issue.name: Cross-site scripting (reflected)
issue.description: Reflected cross-site scripting arises when input is copied into the response without sanitization. Synthetic finding against a benign demo app.
issue.vulnerability_classifications: • CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation

issue.name: Cleartext submission of password
issue.description: The login form submits credentials over an unencrypted connection in this demo environment.

issue.name: Cacheable HTTPS response
issue.description: Cacheable responses may allow sensitive content to be stored by intermediaries.
issue.vulnerability_classifications: • CWE-525: Use of Web Browser Cache Containing Sensitive Information
